description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with two wide, white reflective stripes encircling its conical body. The cone is made of flexible, durable plastic and sits on a large, square black base that appears to be weighted for stability. The surface of the cone shows signs of wear, including scuff marks, dirt, and some fading, indicating it has been used outdoors. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no attachments or openings. The base has a textured, slightly rough appearance, likely to prevent slipping and to keep the cone upright in various weather conditions. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on the cone.
description: An orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a large, weighted black base, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cone's orange body, two white reflective stripes, and the full square black base with visible wear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cone's slightly faded surface and the continuity of the reflective stripes around the body.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the cone's base and the even spacing of the reflective stripes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar wear and the rounded tip, with the base's texture visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, white reflective stripes encircle the cone horizontally, evenly spaced along the upper and middle sections.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is large, square, and black, appearing thick and weighted for stability, with a textured surface for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn, with visible scuff marks, dirt, and some fading, indicating outdoor use.
